channel.title: Redis on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Redis on Arrans github.io

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and product roadmaps in the simplest way possible.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: redis/rueidis
item.description: A fast Golang Redis client that supports Client Side Caching, Auto Pipelining, Generics OM, RedisJSON, RedisBloom, RediSearch, etc.

item.title: EchoVault/EchoVault
item.description: Embeddable Distributed in-memory alternative to Redis.

item.title: juicedata/juicefs
item.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

item.title: xyproto/algernon
item.description: Small self-contained pure-Go web server with Lua, Teal, Markdown, Ollama, HTTP/2, QUIC, Redis and PostgreSQL support

item.title: vercel-labs/slacker
item.description: A bot that notifies you on Slack whenever your company/product is mentioned on Hacker News. Powered by Vercel Functions & Upstash.
